name: Alex Chen
text:

ACM Club — Vice President (2023–2024): organised 5 hackathons, mentored 15 juniors

name: Maria Santos
text:
Maria Santos

Marketing professional with 4 years of experience in campaign analytics and consumer research. Recently completed a 6-month Python bootcamp and seeking to transition into a data-focused role. Strong communicator who can translate technical findings into actionable business insights.

- Built Excel models to forecast campaign ROI with 85% accuracy over 2 years
- Reduced monthly reporting time by 3 hours by automating Excel macros
- Analysed A/B test results for email campaigns, increasing open rates by 18%

Marketing Intern, TechStart Inc (Jan 2019 – May 2019)

- Pulled weekly engagement reports from multiple platforms and summarised trends

PROJECTS
Sales Data Analysis (Python bootcamp capstone)

- Built visualisations with matplotlib to identify seasonal demand patterns
- Wrote a summary report with three actionable recommendations

ACTIVITIES
Data Analytics Meetup (San Francisco) — regular attendee since 2023
Currently studying for Google Data Analytics Certificate
